channel.title: Stuart-Moore on Rob Sewell (aka SQL DBA With A Beard)
channel.description: Recent content in Stuart-Moore on Rob Sewell (aka SQL DBA With A Beard)

item.title: Speaking? You? Go on. #tsql2sday #84
item.description: This is a blog post for this month’s T-SQL Tuesday post, hosted by Andy Yun (b|t). T-SQL Tuesday is a monthly blog event started by Adam Machanic (b|t). The T-SQL Tuesday topic this month was about advice for new speakers. Thanks Andy for hosting. I have created a channel in the SQL Server Community Slack for presenting which everyone can make use of to ask and to answer questions
